content: I'm having fun with unequal exchange. can someone recommend a deck with Faros as a team member and unequal exchange as one of the posses? I've been running this, but now i want to do something sillier. I want to spam posses a bunch.
With this deck, I've been flexing foute é with merciful nurturing. if leigh can shuffle mana gain into deck, i let her do ballet.
There's a wheel that puts an unequal exchange everyturn into your deck
there was a... silverheart gelot team I saw once
Which basically takes advantage of gelot outputting a ton of early game damage
as the frontliner
I feel like you kinda wanna draw through the deck when playing faros to get your posses... maybe something with magic hat?
Faros uvhash magic hat may be interesting, the issue being that uvhash would probably be online a lot faster than you being able to get off faros
Ohh? What was the set up?
<:AmeliaPraySmol:913824863871959050> The team still slaps
wait a second.. I've seen this before o-o
i want doll inferno
everyone was running it before the nerfs to hat
I mean recently
I lost to that recently I swear
like just last week
idk who else runs it rn, I haven't seen it in awhile
why cod btw?
like what was the reasoning behind cod
to go through your deck faster
there's dead cards in the deck
what would you consider dead cards or cards not worth playing? and who takes cod?
I tried to learn magic hat but I never wrapped my head around it
alva's taunt is worth playing but not all the cards are worth playing
cas takes cod
ooo icic
this depends
so these are "keeps" in that sense? like you wouldn't want them to be discarded? but judgement seems off though hmm
no I want those discared in most cases
oh o-o
Shriek is only for late turns, and bloody proclamation is a free discard for cod
don't you normally want to enable uvhash asap though? you don't play bloody proclamation? o-o
maybe I've completely misunderstood hat if so.. how does the gameplan normally look like?
if you have extra arithmetica, but you get most of your aliemus from strikes, cas, and Gdoll
play as many strikes as possible and keep cycling your deck is the gameplan
ohhh so less reliance on arith, more reliance on just trying to draw as many strikes and exalting?
and during early turns probably hold onto strikes unless its causing hand cap for the burst turn?
with hat
and just spend arith on stuff like bloody proclamation
early on
I normally just play my strikes asap, because if I draw alva's card or uvhash card, I wanna play those and will want my hand to be empty
only strike card I normally hold is Alva for suction incase she needs
icic
pretty sure there was a video on the comp somewhere in the chinese trapphase but I would have to find it

content: found it

I've been winning. my loss streak ends with this deck. i decided not to go all out silly posse shenanigans bc it's been winning just fine. Although I did decide to swap 3 wheels. Salvador is so often last man standing and so i decided to give him a more suitable item for this circumstance. So far, I haven't had any benefit from this switch.
i changed leigh item to be yet another unusual exchange generator. I had one game where leigh died turn 2 to 2 hits. Tawil enhanced dafeidol and she shot leigh twice and she died exactly 75. I realize she is undeserving of such a premium item that costs 3. Thus she is demoted to 1 cost item. Plus, she gets her ult quick so it synergizes with her kit. 
Lastly I changed to silent banquet on wanda bc it incentives me choosing posses that get shared to opponent. the old item 5 counter damage, it's not something I'm used to, I would still leave opponents at akward aliemus like 78, but the counter dmg brings them up to 100 when they strike. Not a fan of this interaction.
Gonna try this team out! I love salvador

i started losing :(
now i want to use my new card, spring of... idk. i think in old game it was holy grail. 5 mana 50 energy end of turn. The generic combo is with priest/thais.
i failed my plan so far. game 1 aigis died before she could ult or even equip item. i also had song of bound bottom deck so equiping spring was akward.
i fixed it, yay. i changed lakeside glimpse for mouse wisdom. i did turn 1 spring and won, but i think it's not viable. focus fire is so easy, and thais can easily get one shot.
does anyone else feel like leigh and salvador ult have broken rng and prefer hitting same target? it's ridiculous how often they hit single target
i had one game where all three leigh hits targetted the countering caecus. i was weakened and took more dmg than i dealt. Then the very next game i sniped hameln before he could get going.

it can be fun to compare exalts to double posse and see some are better than others. If you have faros ult and get 2 unusual exchange, which ults have the potential to be outclassed?
example uvash ult 80 dmg bleed, faros ult can do 100-150dmg bleed depending how much mana to spend. but it needs 10 mana limit. leigh ult 54 instant dmg. faros ult 80 instant dmg. 
but something like thais ult cannot be beat. you can kind of get half of her ult. 40 instant heal, 50 energy from thais. 20 instant heal, delayed heal and energy from faros.

6 barrier corposant. 8 barrier faros. 
entwine all 8 dmg aggripa. entwine all 6 dmg faros.
